_comment: issue #196 本素材包風格（packStyle）＋各單品描述（itemDesc）。維護工具可編輯。

packStyle.name: 森林矮人小屋 Dwarf Cottage
packStyle.reference: cozy woodland dwarf cottage, earthy helper cloaks and sturdy boots

items.outer-moss-cloak: a closed helper cloak fastened at the neck and falling straight down the front, fully covering and showing only the smooth outer front surface — no front opening, no gap, no inside or lining visible, in moss green
items.outer-fern-cloak: a closed helper cloak fastened at the neck and falling straight down the front, fully covering and showing only the smooth outer front surface — no front opening, no gap, no inside or lining visible, in fern green
items.outer-violet-cloak: a closed helper cloak fastened at the neck and falling straight down the front, fully covering and showing only the smooth outer front surface — no front opening, no gap, no inside or lining visible, in soft violet
items.outer-autumn-cloak: a closed helper cloak fastened at the neck and falling straight down the front, fully covering and showing only the smooth outer front surface — no front opening, no gap, no inside or lining visible, in warm autumn orange
items.shoes-cocoa-boots: a pair of cocoa-brown dwarf ankle boots with laces, shown from the front as worn standing upright, both boots side by side — do NOT show the soles or a top-down view
items.shoes-silver-boots: a pair of silver dwarf ankle boots with laces, shown from the front as worn standing upright, both boots side by side — do NOT show the soles or a top-down view
